text: assignment run (prospective assignment for Track 3 ACOs, preliminary prospective assignment for Tracks 1 and 2 ACOs); Note that for Track 3 ACOs the prospectively assigned beneficiaries are the same for all assignments with the exception of beneficiaries that have met exclusion criteria for one or more reasons during the performance year.
